title: Squabblemon
description: Pokemon Vanilla+ modpack with optimization mods thrown in to make it run silky smooth
body:
# Squabblemon
Travel the world of Pokémon and Minecraft with new epic biomes from Biomes O' Plenty, Cubic Pokémon that fit the Minecraft art style perfectly from Cobblemon and its addons, and a giant performance pack's worth of optimization mods.
